title: Task 6: omnibase_spi docs refresh and dependency-direction clarification

summary.internal_archive: A paired internal archive preservation PR exists and is open; private repository link intentionally omitted.

ROOT_ENTRYPOINT_REFRESHED.detail: README.md now describes current SPI role, dependency direction, install/setup, protocol addition flow, commands, and docs map.

DOCS_INDEX_REFRESHED.detail: docs/README.md now defines the current truth boundary, start paths, architecture docs, API reference, development docs, validation commands, and maintenance rules.

DEPENDENCY_DIRECTION_EXPLICIT.detail: docs/architecture/DEPENDENCY-DIRECTION.md explains that SPI imports Core, Core must not import SPI, implementation repos implement against SPI, and the SPI name can mislead readers expecting the opposite graph.

CONTRIBUTING_AND_SECURITY_SURFACES.detail: Root CONTRIBUTING.md and SECURITY.md were added, linking to repo-local workflow and reporting guidance.

HISTORICAL_DOCS_REMOVED_FROM_PUBLIC_TREE.detail: Historical decision/design files were removed from public docs after current guidance was promoted into stable architecture docs.

PUBLIC_REFERENCE_SCAN.detail: Public-reference scan across README, docs, scripts, source, tests, and repo metadata found no ticket IDs, Linear links, private workspace paths, transition-file references, or missing plan links.

EMPTY_DIRECTORIES_REMOVED.detail: find checks returned no empty docs or repo directories after historical docs removal.

RUFF.detail: uv run ruff check README.md CLAUDE.md AGENT.md CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md docs pyproject.toml scripts src tests passed.

BUILD.detail: uv build passed and produced sdist and wheel.

PYTEST_REDUCED.detail: uv run pytest --ignore=tests/protocols/runtime/test_protocol_domain_plugin.py passed: 2784 passed, 4 skipped.

PYTEST_FULL.detail: Full uv run pytest passed against the Core compatibility branch that restores ModelDomainPluginResult import compatibility: 2822 passed, 4 skipped.

CORE_COMPATIBILITY_PR_CREATED.detail: Public Core compatibility PR is open: https://github.com/OmniNode-ai/omnibase_core/pull/901.

PR_MERGED.detail: Public PR is open, not merged. Ticket must remain In Review until merge is confirmed.
